introSection: Looping the Loop was a steel roller coaster located at Parque Japonés in Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires, Argentina. It was the first looping roller coaster in South America and had a single vertical loop.
fullText: Looping the Loop was a steel roller coaster located at Parque Japonés in Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires, Argentina. It was the first looping roller coaster in South America and had a single vertical loop.
